heading: Nonapplicability of withdrawal liability for certain temporary contribution obligation periods; exception
label: 1390 Nonapplicability of withdrawal liability for certain temporary contribution obligation periods; exception
notes: Amendments2006—Subsec. (b)(1) to (4). redesignated pars. (2) to (4) as (1) to (3), respectively, and struck out former par. (1) which read as follows: “the plan is not a plan which primarily covers employees in the building and construction industry;”.Pub. L. 109–2801989—Subsec. (b)(3). substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 101–239
